understand_lifesteal.title: Understand the Lifesteal system — PvP hearts, heart floor at 3, Revive Crystal chain, Diet death reset interaction

subtitle.text: PvP kill: +1 heart. PvP death: -1 heart. Sculk death: -1 heart. The floor is 3. The ceiling is whatever you can take.

description: CH.11 · WHERE THE SKIN TEARS
▸ The chapter title is the Lifesteal mechanic.
Combat leaves marks.
The hearts track them.
In singleplayer, the ceiling is irrelevant.
In multiplayer, the ceiling is survival.
◈ LIFESTEAL RULES (SINBORN CONFIG)
└ PvP kill → +1 heart (gain from opponent)
└ PvP death → -1 heart (lose to opponent)
└ Sculk Sickness death → -1 heart
(custom KubeJS script: sculk_death.js via LSData API)
└ Heart floor: 3 hearts minimum (cannot go below)
└ In singleplayer: hearts only increase (no loss source
except Sculk Sickness death — avoidable)
◈ HEART CRYSTAL CHAIN
└ lifesteal:crystal_fragment — drops from Heart Ore
(Y -50 to 70 overworld, all Nether below roof)
└ 4 fragments → lifesteal:crystal_core
(heals 33% max HP on use)
└ 4 cores + diamond → lifesteal:heart_crystal
+1 permanent heart (stackable — no limit stated)
└ heart_crystal + core + ghast_tear + netherite +
totem → lifesteal:revive_crystal
(Revive Crystal: respawn mechanic for PvP servers)
◈ DEATH INTERACTION WARNINGS
└ Diet resets on EVERY death in Sinborn config
Rebuild all 5 diet groups after any death
└ Sculk Sickness death: -1 heart + Diet reset
Two penalties simultaneously — avoid Sculk deaths
└ Corpse But Better: your items drop at death location
You have 5 minutes before corpse despawns
Set corpse gravity to OFF before boss fights
▸ The skin tears in the same place twice.
The first time is the wound.
The second time is the scar.
The heart crystal records both.
Farm the ore. Build the chain.
Enter Ch12 with more than you started with.
▶ Obtain a Heart Crystal
▶ Understand the full Lifesteal system [check]
◇ Heart Ore spawns in the overworld AND the Nether.
Mine it passively during Nether trips (below roof level).
4 fragments per session = 1 crystal per 4 sessions.
Start now. The compound interest matters in Ch12.
